Uses of Class
com.onlinepayments.domain.ShippingDetail

  • Packages that use ShippingDetail 
    Package Description
    com.onlinepayments.domain  

    • Uses of ShippingDetail in com.onlinepayments.domain

      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain that return ShippingDetail 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ShippingDetail CapturePaymentRequest.getShipping()
      Object containing the details of the shipping of the order
      ShippingDetail CancelPaymentRequest.getShipping()
      Object containing the details of the shipping of the order
      ShippingDetail ShippingDetail.withShippingCost(Long value)
      Amount in the smallest currency unit, i.e.: EUR is a 2-decimals currency, the value 1234 will result in EUR 12.34 KWD is a 3-decimals currency, the value 1234 will result in KWD 1.234 JPY is a zero-decimal currency, the value 1234 will result in JPY 1234
      ShippingDetail ShippingDetail.withShippingCostTax(Long value)
      Amount in the smallest currency unit, i.e.: EUR is a 2-decimals currency, the value 1234 will result in EUR 12.34 KWD is a 3-decimals currency, the value 1234 will result in KWD 1.234 JPY is a zero-decimal currency, the value 1234 will result in JPY 1234
      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain with parameters of type ShippingDetail 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void CapturePaymentRequest.setShipping(ShippingDetail value)
      Object containing the details of the shipping of the order
      void CancelPaymentRequest.setShipping(ShippingDetail value)
      Object containing the details of the shipping of the order
      CapturePaymentRequest CapturePaymentRequest.withShipping(ShippingDetail value)
      Object containing the details of the shipping of the order
      CancelPaymentRequest CancelPaymentRequest.withShipping(ShippingDetail value)
      Object containing the details of the shipping of the order
